image_label: test3 - '4x6' studio, single-story plan (heavily photorealistic 3D top view)

scale_origin.note: local origin = SW outer corner. x east, y north. Units METERS. Outer footprint ~3.85 (x, bottom reads 3,70; title '4x6') x 6.00 (y) m. HARDEST image: full photoreal 3D render, no room labels, walls are extruded grey blocks, openings shown as reddish reveals -> wall/window/door discrimination is LOW confidence throughout.

strokes.note: south perimeter wall. Bottom dim 3,70. Healed entry-door opening at x~=1.5 (reddish bottom reveal read as entry; LOW confidence).
west perimeter wall. Two reddish reveals on this wall read as windows (S11 bedroom, S12 living).
east perimeter wall (kitchen side). One reddish reveal -> window S13.
vertical partition: bedroom (west) / bath (east), upper half. LOW confidence on x (~top 2,05 split).
bath south wall. LOW confidence. Healed door opening near x~=2.5 (bath entry, swing not clearly drawn -> low confidence heal).
bedroom west window (upper reddish reveal). LOW conf window-vs-door. World-z unknown. Parent wall S3.
living west window (lower reddish reveal). LOW conf. World-z unknown. Parent wall S3.
kitchen east window (reddish reveal on right wall). LOW conf. World-z unknown. Parent wall S4.

dimensions.note: top overall-ish (m); positioned near top, reading uncertain
wall thickness 15 cm (corner tick); thickness NOT used (thickness_m stays null)

unknowns_noted: NO room labels -> rooms inferred from furniture, but phase1 does not assign rooms (left to phase2); only walls/windows traced
openings shown as reddish 3D reveals -> window vs door discrimination LOW confidence; bottom reveal guessed as entry door (healed), side reveals guessed as windows
interior partitions (S5,S6) LOW confidence; dimension chain reading partly uncertain (D3/D6 overlap)
wall thickness dimensioned (15 cm) but thickness_m kept null per simulation rule
uncaptured_visual_elements: FURNITURE excluded: double bed; grey cubby shelf/divider between bedroom and living (read as furniture, not wall); L-shaped sofa; TV unit; dining stools
SANITARY excluded: bath sink, toilet, shower
EQUIPMENT excluded: kitchen counter, cooktop, sink, fridge
FLOOR-FINISH excluded: wood floor texture, grey bath floor tiles
HEALED DOORS (~2, LOW conf): bottom entry (S1, ~x=1.5); bath door (S6, ~x=2.5) — door symbols not crisply drawn in this render, healed tentatively

AMBIGUITY FLAG: this photoreal render is at the edge of plan-reading; several wall/opening calls are best-guess. Recommend rejecting/redrawing this drawing class in a real pipeline, or supplying a line-drawing version
